\tzpentry{ID3541}{Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3541 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \hat H=\hat H_1+\hat H_2+ \hat V_{\text{int}},\qquad \hat V_{\text{int}} = g\,\delta(x_1-x_2)\ \text{(or another local coupling)}. \]
